# Risk Register

**Project**: [Project Name]  
**Last Updated**: [YYYY-MM-DD]  
**Risk Owner**: [Role]  
**Total Risks**: [N] ([X] open, [Y] mitigated, [Z] closed)

## Active Risks

### RISK-[NNN]: [Risk Title]
**ID**: RISK-[NNN]  
**Identified**: [YYYY-MM-DD]  
**Category**: [Technical | Schedule | Resource | Business | External]  
**Status**: Open | Monitoring | Mitigated | Closed

**Description**:
[Detailed description of the risk]

**Likelihood**: High (>70%) | Medium (30-70%) | Low (<30%)  
**Impact**: High (Critical) | Medium (Significant) | Low (Minor)  
**Risk Score**: [Likelihood × Impact] = [High/Medium/Low]

**Triggers** (Early Warning Signs):
- [Warning sign 1]
- [Warning sign 2]

**Mitigation Strategy**:
1. [Action to reduce likelihood or impact]
2. [Action to reduce likelihood or impact]

**Contingency Plan** (If risk occurs):
1. [Response action 1]
2. [Response action 2]

**Owner**: [Who is responsible for monitoring]  
**Review Date**: [Next review date]
